results.details: api/refresh.ts is a stub implementation that only returns { status: 'ok' } without triggering any GitHub action. The feature api-refresh-route has status 'pending' and does not meet the expected behavior: 'Reads GITHUB_PAT and GITHUB_REPO, POSTs to GitHub API to dispatch the workflow, returns { run_url }'.
